name: Warm Asparagus with Black Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vin Santo or other dry fragrant wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the asparagus and snap off the stem ends with fingers.
2. In a double boiler (large enough to hold asparagus in water portion), combine yolks, egg, and wine with whisk, stirring vigorously until frothy mixture forms.
3. Remove egg mixture from heat and cook asparagus for 1 minute and 15 seconds in the bottom half of the pan.
4. Meanwhile, whisk butter, cream, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper into the egg mixture and season with salt.
5. Remove asparagus and divide among four plates. Divide sauce among the plates, sprinkle with fresh cracked pepper, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
